bml.list.drop_hint: Drop .litematic files here to add them to your schematics folder
bml.config.hover_tooltip.comment: Show the info popup when hovering an item on the material list.
bml.tip.party: Open the party menu (invite/sync with friends)
bml.tip.layout: Switch layout: 2 columns horizontal / vertical / single
bml.tip.auto: Auto-refresh the list every few seconds
bml.tip.cache: Clear the cached list and tracked-chest contents
bml.tip.filter_placed: Hide items that are fully placed
bml.tip.filter_stored: Hide items you already have stored
bml.tip.players: Filter the list to a player's targeted items
bml.key.open_gui.c: Open the Better List material list.
bml.key.reload_list.c: Force a re-scan of the material list.
bml.key.open_config.c: Open the Better List settings screen.
bml.key.hud_scroll_fwd.c: Scroll the targeted-items HUD to later items (Ctrl+J).
bml.hud.title: Targets
bml.chest.cache_cleared: [BetterList] Cache cleared. Use the recount button to refresh.
bml.chests.title: Tracked chests (%s)
bml.chests.empty: No tracked chests. Mark a chest with the button when you open it.
bml.preview.title: Chest contents
bml.party.title: Better List — Party
bml.party.no_server: Server does not support BetterList Party/Sync.
bml.party.no_server_hint: Ask an admin to install the Better List for Litematica mod/plugin.
bml.party.not_in_party: You are not in a party
bml.party.invite_received: [BetterList] %s invites you to a party! (Open the Better List GUI → Party or press O to accept)
bml.party.disbanded: [BetterList] You were disconnected from the party.
bml.hud.on: [BetterList] Targeted-items HUD: ON (right-click items on the list)
bml.net.version_mismatch: [BetterList] Someone in the party runs a different mod version — sync may be incomplete. Update to the same version.
bml.sync.missing_schematic: [BetterList] Missing schematic: %s – copy the .litematic file into the schematics/ folder, then load it in Litematica.
bml.sync.auto_loaded: [BetterList] Auto-loaded and placed a schematic from a friend: %s
